content: Self-Refine's iterative no-supervision refinement framework can be repurposed to unify disjoint multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning inconsistent reflection perspectives from different solving directions into a sequential self-feedback loop that progressively aligns conflicting reflections into a more robust final output. This creates a multi-perspective reflection system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data.
